root_cause: CI tested only Python 3.12 after pyproject.toml was changed to requires-python>=3.11; version-sensitive code (str(Direction.LONG) behavior) and the production environment (Python 3.11.15) were not covered
fix_summary: Added strategy.matrix with ['3.11','3.12'] and fail-fast:false; updated setup-python to use matrix.python-version; updated CLAUDE.md runtime line
